approval_text_required: Approve real PKG-18M-PRIZE-PACK-STAMPED-PARENT-INSERTS apply only. Fingerprint: 2eccac5fc5f0f2a9db366b48aa135370d06a4f08f247f722bfea8dbd14bc917d. Scope: 12 stamped parent inserts, 12 identity inserts, 12 child printing inserts; finishes normal=12; stamp labels Prize Pack Stamp=12; sets swsh5=3, swsh7=3, swsh9=3, swsh1=2, swsh6=1. Dry-run proof: 7e5152fe7a90bfaa2e472a9e6fbeacef4361612e561787ff70e9ce50c337a28c == 7e5152fe7a90bfaa2e472a9e6fbeacef4361612e561787ff70e9ce50c337a28c. No global apply. No migrations. No deletes. No merges. No unsupported cleanup.
